decision.minimal_confirmation_package: Reuse the existing primary-minus-sham segmented acquisition shape and replace only the R_sham < 0 adjudication gate with local paired D > 0 ordering gates.

absolute_sham_sign_instability.interpretation: relation_sham is a weak near-zero local comparator. Its absolute sign is not stable across fresh carrier resets, while the primary-minus-sham separation is stable at round and one-factor matched-stratum levels.

factor_levels_where_ordering_weakens.crossed_cell_warning: Six-factor crossed cells are sparse with four block samples per cell and do not support a prospective crossed-cell sign gate.

question: Why does relation_sham cross zero while primary-minus-sham ordering persists?
